---
title: "Sir William Perceval Heathcote 6th Bt."
---

## Sir William Perceval Heathcote 6th Bt.

**Dates:** (7 Sept 1826-29 Oct 1903)

### Description

eldest son of Sir W. Heathcote

### Biography

He married, while quartered in Ireland Oct (or PB 5 Sept 1849?) Letitia Maria Daly (d. 22 Aug 1910) ' in haste a young and devout Roman Catholic lady who was quite unknown to all his relations'.  He later converted to Roman Catholicism. [Awdry, <i>Heathcote</i>; PB]

### Letters

- Letter from Aug 7 th [1876]
- Letter from Oct 21st 1844[[footnote:1]]
- Letter from [late December 1838  or early January  1839]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
